## What this changes

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (world / module / simulator / data source / writing tool)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (type-check + lint).
- [ ] `npm test` passes; new pure logic has unit tests.
- [ ] Demo Mode still works with **no API keys**.
- [ ] Any new data is labelled with the correct `<Badge>` (`Live` / `Demo` / `Estimated` / `Simulated`).
- [ ] No secrets committed; keys read only in `src/app/api/*`.
- [ ] Responsive on mobile; no overlapping cards.
